 Legal 
 
# Data Use

 Last updated 28 June 2026 
 This is the plain-language version of how Adgent handles the data in your connected accounts. It is a companion to our full Privacy Policy — where the two cover the same ground, the Privacy Policy governs. The short version: we read what you connect to do the analysis you asked for, we keep you in control of every change, and we never sell your data, use it for ads, or train AI models on it. 

## 01 What we connect to

 With your authorization, Adgent reads data from the platforms you connect. We request only the access the features you use require. Depending on what you connect, that includes: 

- Meta, Google Ads & TikTok (advertising) — account, campaign, ad set, and ad structure; budgets, bids, and settings; and performance metrics such as spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, ROAS, CPA, CPM, placements, and audiences. Where you grant execution access, we can apply changes you approve.
 
- Google Analytics 4 — aggregated traffic, engagement, and conversion reporting, to give your ad data on-site context.
 
- Shopify — store reporting such as revenue and order metrics, to connect ad spend to real business results.
 
- Google Search Console — search performance reporting such as queries, clicks, and impressions.

## 02 Why we access it

 Every connection exists to power a feature you can see. We use the data to build your daily brief and health score, detect anomalies, answer the questions you ask, generate the reports and audits you request, and prepare recommended changes. We do not request access to data we do not need, and we do not request access for features that do not yet exist. 

## 03 How we use it

 Your connected data is used solely to provide the service back to you. It is processed — including by the AI that powers Adgent's analysis — to generate your briefs, answers, and reports, and, on your approval, to carry out changes you ask for. We do not use one customer's data to benefit another. 

## 04 What we never do

- We never sell your data or transfer it to data brokers or resellers.
 
- We never use your data for advertising , including retargeting or interest-based ads.
 
- We never use your data to train generalized or non-personalized AI/ML models .
 
- We never let humans read your data except with your consent, for security, to investigate abuse, where required by law, or in aggregated/de-identified form for internal operations.
 
- We never use your data to determine credit-worthiness or for lending.

## 05 Google Limited Use

 Adgent's use and transfer of information received from Google APIs to any other app will adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy , including the Limited Use requirements. 

## 06 Your control

- Read-only by default — Adgent only reads unless you grant execution access.
 
- You approve every change — nothing is applied to your accounts until you say go.
 
- Disconnect anytime — revoke access from Adgent or from the platform's settings, which stops further access immediately.
 
- Delete anytime — request deletion of your data, or delete your account, at any time. See Your rights & data deletion .

## 07 Per-platform notes

### Google

 Our use of information from Google APIs (Google Ads, Google Analytics 4, and Search Console) adheres to the Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements. We do not use Google user data for ads, do not sell it, and do not use it to train generalized AI/ML models. 
 
### Meta

 Data accessed via Meta's APIs is processed only as described here and in our Privacy Policy, and in line with applicable Meta terms and developer policies. You can request deletion or revoke access at any time. 
 
### TikTok

 We use TikTok's developer tools to read advertising and reporting data and, where authorized, to carry out changes you approve. Your use of TikTok remains governed by the TikTok Developer Terms and the applicable TikTok Privacy Policy . 

### Contact us

 Questions about how we use your data? Email osman@adgent.app . Adgent is operated by Futuready Labs. Read the full Privacy Policy .

========================================================================
URL: https://adgent.app/privacy
========================================================================
Adgent 

 EN TR 
 Request demo 

 Legal 
 
# Privacy Policy

 Effective 28 June 2026 · Last updated 28 June 2026 
 This Privacy Policy explains how Adgent , a service operated by Futuready Labs ("Adgent", "we", "us", or "our"), collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects information when you use our website and our marketing-intelligence service. A core part of Adgent is connecting, with your authorization, to your advertising and analytics platforms — including Meta , Google , TikTok , Google Analytics 4 , Shopify , and Google Search Console — to read reporting data and, only on your explicit approval, carry out changes you ask us to make. 

## 01 Who we are and scope

 Adgent is an AI marketing-intelligence service for performance marketers. It reads the advertising and analytics accounts you connect, tells you what is working and what is not, answers your questions, and — when you approve it — applies changes back to those accounts. 
 This policy covers the Adgent website and the Adgent application. It applies to two broad groups of information: (1) information about you as a user or prospective user of Adgent, and (2) the data we access from the platforms you connect on your behalf. It does not govern the platforms themselves — your use of Meta, Google, TikTok, Shopify, and related services remains subject to their own terms and privacy policies. 

## 02 Information we collect

### Information you give us

- Account & contact details — your name, work email, company, role, and similar details you provide when you request a demo, sign up, or contact us.
 
- Communications — messages you send us, including support requests and the questions you ask the Adgent assistant.
 
- Billing details — where you hold a paid plan, billing contact information and payment status (card processing is handled by our payment provider; we do not store full card numbers).

### Information we collect automatically

- Usage & device data — log data such as IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and actions taken, used to operate, secure, and improve the service.
 
- Cookies & similar technologies — used for sign-in, security, preferences, and basic analytics. You can control non-essential cookies through your browser settings.

### Connection credentials

 When you connect a platform, we receive and store authorization tokens (for example, OAuth access and refresh tokens) that let Adgent access that account on your behalf. We never ask for, collect, or store your platform passwords. 

## 03 Connected platform data

 With your authorization, Adgent accesses data from the platforms you connect. The data we read depends on which platforms you connect and the permissions you grant, and may include: 

- Advertising platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok) — account, campaign, ad set, and ad structure; budgets, bids, and settings; performance and delivery metrics (such as spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, ROAS, CPA, CPM, placements, and audiences). Where you grant execution access, we can apply changes you approve, such as adjusting budgets, pausing or editing campaigns, or building new campaigns.
 
- Analytics & commerce sources (Google Analytics 4, Shopify, Google Search Console) — aggregated reporting data such as sessions, traffic and conversion metrics, store revenue and order metrics, and search performance, used to give your advertising data business context.
 
 We request only the access needed to provide the features you use. We do not request access to data we do not need, and we do not "future-proof" by requesting access to data for features that do not yet exist. 
 
 Read-only by default. Adgent operates in read-only mode unless you grant execution access, and even then no change is made to your accounts until you explicitly approve it. You remain in control of every change. 

## 04 How we use information

 We use information solely to provide, secure, and improve the user-facing features of Adgent. Specifically, we use it to: 

- Analyze your connected accounts and produce briefs, health scores, anomaly alerts, and reports;
 
- Answer your questions about your accounts and generate the reports and audits you request;
 
- Prepare recommended changes and, on your explicit approval, apply them to your connected accounts;
 
- Provide support, communicate with you about the service, and manage billing;
 
- Maintain the security, integrity, and reliability of the service, and detect and prevent fraud or abuse;
 
- Comply with legal obligations.
 
 Our use of data accessed through platform APIs is limited to the practices described in this policy. If we ever want to use that data in a new way, we will update this policy and obtain your consent before doing so. 

## 05 Limited use & AI commitments

 We hold ourselves to strict limits on what we do with the data we access on your behalf. We do not : 

- Sell or transfer your data to third parties such as advertising platforms, data brokers, or information resellers;
 
- Use your data for serving advertising, including retargeting, personalized, or interest-based advertising;
 
- Use your data to determine credit-worthiness or for lending purposes;
 
- Allow humans to read your data, except with your affirmative consent (for example, for support you request), where necessary for security or to investigate abuse, to comply with law, or where the data has been aggregated/de-identified and is used for internal operations;
 
- Use your Connected Platform Data to train generalized or non-personalized artificial-intelligence or machine-learning models.
 
 Adgent uses AI to analyze and reason over your data in order to deliver the service back to you . Data is processed transiently to generate your briefs, answers, and reports; it is not used to train foundation models or models for the benefit of any other customer. 
 
 Adgent's use and transfer of information received from Google APIs to any other app will adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy , including the Limited Use requirements. 

## 06 Legal bases

 Where the GDPR or similar laws apply, we process personal data on the following bases: performance of a contract (to provide the service you sign up for); legitimate interests (to secure, maintain, and improve the service, where not overridden by your rights); consent (for example, when you authorize a platform connection or opt in to non-essential cookies); and legal obligation (to comply with applicable law). You may withdraw consent at any time. 

## 07 How we share information

 We do not sell your data. We share it only as needed to run the service: 

- Service providers (sub-processors) — trusted vendors that help us host, operate, secure, and support Adgent, including cloud infrastructure providers and the AI model provider that processes data to generate your results. They may only process data on our instructions and to provide their service to us, and are contractually required to protect it and delete it when no longer needed.
 
- The platforms you connect — when you approve a change, we send the corresponding instruction to that platform's API to carry it out.
 
- Legal & safety — where required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of Adgent, our users, or the public.
 
- Business transfers — in connection with a merger, acquisition, financing, or sale of assets, subject to the protections of this policy and with notice to affected users.

## 08 Data retention

 We keep information only as long as needed to provide the service and for legitimate legal, security, and operational purposes. Connected Platform Data is retained while your connection is active and your account is open, and is deleted (or de-identified) when it is no longer necessary to provide the service, when you disconnect a platform, or when you delete your account — subject to limited retention required by law. You can request deletion at any time as described below. 

## 09 Your rights & data deletion

 Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to the processing of your personal data, to data portability, and to withdraw consent. We give every user an easily accessible way to exercise these rights: 

- Disconnect at any time — you can revoke Adgent's access to any connected platform at any time from your Adgent settings or from that platform's app/permission settings. Revoking access stops further data access immediately.
 
- Request correction or deletion — email osman@adgent.app and we will action your request without undue delay.
 
- Delete your account — deleting your account deletes the associated user and Connected Platform Data, except where we are required to retain limited records by law.
 
 We will not charge you to exercise these rights, and we will not discriminate against you for doing so. If you are in the EEA or UK and have an unresolved concern, you may contact your local data protection authority. 

## 10 Security

 We take reasonable and appropriate measures to protect data against unauthorized access, use, alteration, loss, or disclosure. These include encryption of data in transit and at rest, access controls and least-privilege practices, protection of access tokens and application secrets, and monitoring. We provide a clearly marked way to report security concerns, and we begin remediation and notify affected parties as required by law if an incident occurs. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, but we work to protect your data and continually improve our safeguards. 

## 11 International transfers

 We may process and store information in countries other than your own, including where our service providers operate. Where personal data is transferred across borders, we rely on appropriate safeguards (such as standard contractual clauses) as required by applicable law. 

## 12 Children

 Adgent is a business tool intended for use by adults aged 18 and over. It is not directed to children, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, contact us and we will delete it. 

## 13 Platform-specific disclosures

### Google

 Adgent's use of information received from Google APIs (including Google Ads, Google Analytics 4, and Google Search Console) adheres to the Google API Services User Data Policy , including the Limited Use requirements. We do not use Google user data for advertising, do not sell it, and do not use it to train generalized AI/ML models. 
 
### Meta

 Data accessed through Meta's APIs is processed in accordance with this policy and with applicable Meta terms and developer policies. You can ask us to delete data accessed via Meta at any time using the contact details below, and you may revoke Adgent's access from your Meta account settings. 
 
### TikTok

 When you connect TikTok, Adgent uses TikTok's developer tools to read advertising and reporting data and, where authorized, to carry out the changes you approve. Your use of TikTok remains governed by the TikTok Developer Terms and the applicable TikTok Privacy Policy . You can disconnect TikTok at any time to stop further access. 
 
### Shopify

 Where you connect Shopify, Adgent reads store reporting data (such as revenue and order metrics) to give your advertising performance commercial context. We do not access more than is needed for that purpose. 

## 14 Changes to this policy

 We may update this policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the "Last updated" date above and, for material changes, provide additional notice. If a change affects how we use data accessed through platform APIs, we will obtain your consent before applying the change to that data. Your continued use of Adgent after an update means you accept the revised policy. 

### Contact us

 Questions about this policy or your data? Email osman@adgent.app . Adgent is operated by Futuready Labs.

URL: https://adgent.app/terms

Adgent

# Terms of Service

 Effective 28 June 2026 · Last updated 28 June 2026 
 These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Adgent , a marketing-intelligence service operated by Futuready Labs ("Adgent", "we", "us", or "our"). By accessing or using Adgent — including by connecting any advertising or analytics platform — you agree to these Terms. If you are using Adgent on behalf of a company, you agree on its behalf and confirm you have authority to do so. If you do not agree, do not use Adgent. 

## 01 The service

 Adgent is an AI marketing-intelligence service that, with your authorization, reads the advertising and analytics accounts you connect — including Meta, Google, TikTok, Google Analytics 4, Shopify, and Google Search Console — analyzes them, answers your questions, and, where you grant execution access, applies changes that you approve. Features available to you depend on your plan and the connections and permissions you grant. 

## 02 Eligibility

 You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a binding contract to use Adgent. You represent that you own, or are authorized to manage, the advertising and analytics accounts you connect, and that your use of Adgent with those accounts does not violate any agreement between you and the relevant platform or any third party. 

## 03 Accounts

 You are responsible for the information you provide, for the activity under your account, and for keeping your credentials secure. Notify us promptly of any unauthorized use. You must provide accurate information and keep it up to date. 

## 04 Connecting your platforms

 When you connect a platform, you authorize Adgent to access that account on your behalf through the platform's API in line with the permissions you grant and our Privacy Policy . You represent that you have all rights and permissions necessary to grant this access and to allow Adgent to process the resulting data. You may disconnect any platform at any time, which stops further access. 

## 05 Approvals & execution

 Adgent operates in read-only mode by default . Where you grant execution access, Adgent may prepare recommended changes, but no change is made to your accounts until you explicitly approve it . You are responsible for reviewing and approving changes and for the outcomes of changes you approve. Adgent is a decision-support tool; final decisions and accountability for your advertising spend remain yours. 

## 06 Acceptable use

 You agree not to, and not to permit anyone to: 

- Use Adgent in violation of any law, regulation, or the terms or policies of any connected platform (including those of Meta, Google, and TikTok);
 
- Access or connect accounts you are not authorized to manage;
 
- Reverse engineer, decompile, scrape, or attempt to derive the source code of the service, except where this restriction is prohibited by law;
 
- Interfere with, disrupt, or place undue load on the service or its infrastructure, or attempt to bypass security or access controls;
 
- Resell, sublicense, or provide the service to third parties except as expressly permitted;
 
- Use the service to build a competing product, or to transmit malware or unlawful, infringing, or harmful content.

## 07 Your data & privacy

 Our collection and use of information is described in our Privacy Policy , which is incorporated into these Terms. You retain ownership of your data and the data in your connected accounts. You grant us a limited license to access, process, and store that data solely to provide and improve the service for you, consistent with the Privacy Policy. 

## 08 Plans & billing

 Some features require a paid plan. Where you purchase a plan, you agree to the fees, billing cycle, and terms presented at checkout. Unless stated otherwise, paid plans are billed in advance, monthly plans may be cancelled at any time and take effect at the end of the current billing period, and fees are non-refundable except where required by law. We may change pricing on prospective notice. 

## 09 Intellectual property

 Adgent, including the service, software, models, and all related content and trademarks (other than your data and third-party marks), is owned by Futuready Labs and its licensors and is protected by intellectual-property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable right to use the service in accordance with these Terms. We welcome feedback and may use it without restriction or obligation to you. 

## 10 Third-party platforms

 Adgent integrates with third-party platforms including Meta, Google, TikTok, Shopify, and Google Search Console. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by these companies, and their names and logos are the property of their respective owners. Your use of each platform is governed by that platform's own terms and policies, and we are not responsible for the platforms, their availability, or changes they make to their APIs that may affect the service. 

## 11 AI output & no guarantees

 Adgent uses AI to analyze data and generate briefs, answers, recommendations, and reports. This output is provided for informational and decision-support purposes, may contain errors or omissions, and should be reviewed before you act on it. We do not guarantee any particular result, including any improvement in advertising performance, return on ad spend, or savings. You are solely responsible for decisions you make and changes you approve. 

## 12 Disclaimers

 To the fullest extent permitted by law, the service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, non-infringement, and any warranties arising from course of dealing or usage. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure. 

## 13 Limitation of liability

 To the fullest extent permitted by law, Futuready Labs and its officers, employees, and suppliers will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for any loss of profits, revenue, data, goodwill, or advertising spend, arising out of or relating to your use of the service. Our total liability for any claim relating to the service will not exceed the greater of the amounts you paid us for the service in the twelve months before the claim or one hundred U.S. dollars (USD 100). Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations, so some of these may not apply to you. 

## 14 Indemnification

 You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Futuready Labs from claims, damages, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of your use of the service, your data or connected accounts, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any law or the rights of a third party, including any connected platform's terms. 

## 15 Termination

 You may stop using Adgent and disconnect your platforms at any time. We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these Terms, if required for security or legal reasons, or if a connected platform requires it. On termination, your right to use the service ends; we will handle your data as described in the Privacy Policy . Sections that by their nature should survive (including intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and indemnification) will survive termination. 

## 16 Changes to these terms

 We may update these Terms from time to time. We will revise the "Last updated" date above and, for material changes, provide additional notice. Your continued use of Adgent after an update means you accept the revised Terms. 

## 17 Governing law

 These Terms are governed by the laws of [ governing jurisdiction ] , without regard to conflict-of-laws rules, and the courts of [ jurisdiction / venue ] will have exclusive jurisdiction over disputes, except where applicable law gives you the right to bring a claim in your local courts. Nothing in these Terms limits any mandatory consumer-protection rights you may have. 

### Contact us

 Questions about these Terms? Email osman@adgent.app . Adgent is operated by Futuready Labs.
